summary: End-to-end testing of ACTIVA FOUNDER OS CRM (/crm) completed successfully. All 21 backend pytest cases and all critical frontend flows (login, Hoy dashboard, Pipeline Kanban, Contactos CRUD, New Lead modal, ContactDetailModal with Datos/Timeline/IA Copilot tabs, AI Copilot GPT-4o WhatsApp generation, Ajustes meta_mensual update, sidebar navigation, logout) passed. AI Copilot returned real Spanish GPT-4o content (verified: '¡Hola UI Tester! 😊 Soy de [Tu Empresa]...'). No _id leaks. Metrics, pipeline grouping, timeline events (creado/etapa/llamada), and pipeline move all work correctly.

issues: 'Nuevo Lead' button in Pipeline and Contactos sections lacks data-testid (only Hoy section has data-testid="new-lead-btn"). Non-blocking but reduces testability in those sections.

Form fields use visible label text but labels are not associated via htmlFor/id, so Playwright get_by_label() resolves by accessible-name only inconsistently. Adding htmlFor/id pairs would improve a11y and testability.

action_items: (Minor/optional) Add data-testid to the 'Nuevo Lead' buttons inside PipelineSection and ContactosSection (currently only Hoy has it).
(Minor/optional) Associate <label htmlFor> with <input id> in FormField used in NewLeadModal & ContactDetailModal for stronger a11y + testing.

(Minor) Consider adding data-testid to ContactDetailModal tab buttons (Datos / Timeline / IA Copilot) and to AI generator buttons (Generar Email, Mensaje WhatsApp, Sugerir Follow-up, Calcular Score) for future regression automation.
critical_code_review_comments: CRMPage.js is 1346 lines - consider splitting into HoySection.js, PipelineSection.js, ContactsSection.js, ContactDetailModal.js, NewLeadModal.js, SettingsSection.js modules. File exceeds the 700-line guideline.
crm.py: datetime handling is duplicated across multiple endpoints (parse ISO ↔ datetime). Extract a helper `_parse_dates(doc)` to DRY up 6+ repetitions.
crm.py get_contacts: the sin_seguimiento branch parses ultimo_contacto twice and with different code paths; consolidate into one normalization pass before filtering.
crm.py get_db(): creates a NEW AsyncIOMotorClient on every request which is inefficient and can exhaust Mongo connections under load. Use a module-level singleton client (like server.py does).
crm.py update_settings accepts raw `dict` without validation; use a Pydantic model (SettingsUpdate) to avoid arbitrary field writes to the collection.
server.py admin tokens stored in an in-memory dict (`active_admin_tokens`) — lost on restart and not shared across replicas. Fine for current MVP but must move to DB/Redis for production.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contacts during tests; all cleaned up after each test class and at end of run. Ajustes meta_mensual was set to 7,500,000 during UI test (left as-is).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_crm.py covers: admin login, metrics, pipeline (incl. move + invalid stage), contacts CRUD + filters (etapa/fuente/search/calientes/sin_seguimiento), timeline (event creation + desc sort + ultimo_contacto update), settings (get default + update meta_mensual), AI (whatsapp/email/followup/score/priorities). All 21 passed in ~12s. GPT-4o via emergentintegrations is real and working. /crm UI uses password login; once logged in, session kept via localStorage. Meta mensual was set to 7,500,000 during testing.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Only minor testability/code-quality improvements suggested.
